greetings.hello: Hello Sir! How can I help you?
greetings.hey: Hey Sir! What can I do for you?
greetings.good morning: Good morning Sir! Ready to start your day?
greetings.good afternoon: Good afternoon Sir! How can I help?
greetings.good evening: Good evening Sir! What would you like to do?
greetings.how are you: I'm doing great Sir! Always ready to help.
greetings.what's up: All systems perfect Sir! What can I do for you?

about.who are you: I'm STARK, your personal AI assistant. I'm here to help you with anything you need, Sir.
about.what are you: I'm STARK, a voice-controlled AI assistant designed to help you with tasks, answer questions, control your computer, and much more.
about.your name: My name is STARK, Sir. I'm your personal AI assistant.
about.who made you: I was created to serve you, Sir. I'm STARK, your dedicated AI assistant.
about.what can you do: I can read your screen, watch through camera, control YouTube, Spotify, Netflix, send WhatsApp messages, help in meetings, write code, set reminders, and much more, Sir!

health_tips: Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily, Sir.
Take breaks every 45 minutes while working, Sir.
Get 7-8 hours of sleep for optimal performance, Sir.
Eat more fruits and vegetables, Sir.
Reduce screen time before bed for better sleep, Sir.
Practice deep breathing when stressed, Sir.
Maintain good posture while working, Sir.
motivation: You're capable of amazing things, Sir. Keep pushing forward!
Every challenge is an opportunity to grow, Sir.
Success comes from consistent effort, Sir. You've got this!
Believe in yourself, Sir. You're stronger than you think.
The only limit is your mind, Sir. Dream big!
Hard work always pays off, Sir. Stay focused!
You've overcome so much already, Sir. Keep going!
Your potential is unlimited, Sir. Make it happen!

subjects.python: Python is a versatile programming language known for its readability. It's used for web development, data science, AI, automation, and more.
subjects.javascript: JavaScript is the language of the web. It runs in browsers and on servers (Node.js).
subjects.html:
HTML structures web content using tags like
,

,

.
subjects.css: CSS styles HTML elements with colors, fonts, and layouts.
subjects.sql: SQL manages databases with commands: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE.
subjects.api: API lets software communicate using HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE.
subjects.machine learning: Machine Learning is AI that learns from data. Types: supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement.
subjects.react: React is a JavaScript library by Facebook for building user interfaces using components.
subjects.django: Django is a high-level Python web framework that encourages rapid development.
subjects.docker: Docker is a platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers.
subjects.git: Git is a distributed version control system for tracking changes in source code.
subjects.cloud computing: Cloud computing delivers computing services over the internet including servers, storage, databases, and software.
subjects.blockchain: Blockchain is a decentralized, distributed ledger that records transactions across many computers.
subjects.cybersecurity: Cybersecurity is the practice of protecting systems, networks, and programs from digital attacks.

general_knowledge.founder of amazon: Sir, Amazon was founded by Jeff Bezos on July 5, 1994, in Bellevue, Washington.
general_knowledge.founder of google: Sir, Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin on September 4, 1998.
general_knowledge.founder of microsoft: Sir, Microsoft was founded by Bill Gates and Paul Allen on April 4, 1975.
general_knowledge.founder of apple: Sir, Apple was founded by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne on April 1, 1976.
general_knowledge.founder of facebook: Sir, Facebook (now Meta) was founded by Mark Zuckerberg on February 4, 2004.
general_knowledge.founder of tesla: Sir, Tesla was incorporated by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning in 2003. Elon Musk joined as chairman in 2004.
general_knowledge.founder of twitter: Sir, Twitter was co-founded by Jack Dorsey, Noah Glass, Biz Stone, and Evan Williams in 2006.
general_knowledge.founder of netflix: Sir, Netflix was founded by Reed Hastings and Marc Randolph on August 29, 1997.
general_knowledge.capital of india: Sir, the capital of India is New Delhi.
general_knowledge.capital of usa: Sir, the capital of the United States is Washington, D.C.
general_knowledge.capital of uk: Sir, the capital of the United Kingdom is London.
general_knowledge.capital of china: Sir, the capital of China is Beijing.
general_knowledge.capital of japan: Sir, the capital of Japan is Tokyo.
general_knowledge.capital of australia: Sir, the capital of Australia is Canberra.
general_knowledge.capital of france: Sir, the capital of France is Paris.
general_knowledge.who is narendra modi: Sir, Narendra Modi is the Prime Minister of India, serving since May 26, 2014.
general_knowledge.who is elon musk: Sir, Elon Musk is a business magnate, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, and owner of X (formerly Twitter).
general_knowledge.who is bill gates: Sir, Bill Gates is the co-founder of Microsoft and a prominent philanthropist.
general_knowledge.who is jeff bezos: Sir, Jeff Bezos is the founder of Amazon and Blue Origin.
general_knowledge.who is mark zuckerberg: Sir, Mark Zuckerberg is the co-founder and CEO of Meta (formerly Facebook).
general_knowledge.what is ai: Sir, Artificial Intelligence is the simulation of human intelligence by machines, enabling them to learn, reason, and solve problems.
general_knowledge.what is machine learning: Sir, Machine Learning is a branch of AI where computers learn patterns from data without being explicitly programmed.
general_knowledge.what is the internet: Sir, the Internet is a global network of interconnected computers that communicate using standardized protocols.
general_knowledge.largest country: Sir, Russia is the largest country in the world by land area, covering about 17.1 million square kilometers.
general_knowledge.smallest country: Sir, Vatican City is the smallest country in the world, covering just 0.44 square kilometers.
general_knowledge.tallest mountain: Sir, Mount Everest is the tallest mountain in the world at 8,849 meters (29,032 feet) above sea level.
general_knowledge.longest river: Sir, the Nile River in Africa is generally considered the longest river in the world at about 6,650 kilometers.
general_knowledge.speed of light: Sir, the speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792,458 meters per second (about 3 × 10^8 m/s).
general_knowledge.distance from earth to sun: Sir, the average distance from Earth to the Sun is about 149.6 million kilometers, also called 1 Astronomical Unit (AU).
general_knowledge.who invented telephone: Sir, the telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell in 1876.
general_knowledge.who invented electricity: Sir, electricity is a natural phenomenon that was not invented but discovered and harnessed. Benjamin Franklin studied it in the 1700s, while Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla pioneered its practical electrical systems.
general_knowledge.who invented computer: Sir, Charles Babbage is credited as the father of the computer for designing the Analytical Engine in the 1830s. Modern computers were developed by many pioneers including Alan Turing and John von Neumann.
general_knowledge.who invented internet: Sir, the internet was developed from ARPANET, with Tim Berners-Lee inventing the World Wide Web in 1989.
general_knowledge.national animal of india: Sir, the national animal of India is the Bengal Tiger.
general_knowledge.national bird of india: Sir, the national bird of India is the Indian Peacock.
general_knowledge.national flower of india: Sir, the national flower of India is the Lotus.

cooking.mutton biryani: Sir, to prepare Mutton Biryani: 1) Marinate mutton with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, chili powder, turmeric, garam masala for 2 hours. 2) Soak basmati rice for 30 minutes, parboil with whole spices. 3) Fry onions until golden brown. 4) Cook marinated mutton with tomatoes until tender. 5) Layer rice over mutton, add saffron milk, fried onions, mint, coriander. 6) Seal with dough, cook on low heat (dum) for 25 minutes. Serve hot!
cooking.chicken biryani: Sir, for Chicken Biryani: Marinate chicken with yogurt, spices, and ginger-garlic paste for 1 hour. Parboil basmati rice with whole spices. Layer chicken and rice in a pot. Add fried onions, mint, saffron milk. Cook on dum (low heat) for 20-25 minutes. Serve with raita.
cooking.pasta: Sir, for Basic Pasta: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente (8-10 mins). In a pan, saute garlic in olive oil, add tomato sauce or canned tomatoes, season with basil, oregano, salt, pepper. Toss cooked pasta in the sauce. Top with parmesan cheese.
cooking.tea: Sir, for Indian Chai: Boil 1 cup water. Add 1 tsp tea leaves, 1/2 cup milk, sugar to taste, crushed cardamom, and grated ginger. Simmer for 3-5 minutes. Strain and serve hot.
cooking.dosa: Sir, for Dosa: Soak rice and urad dal (4:1 ratio) for 6-8 hours. Grind to smooth batter, ferment overnight. On a hot tawa, pour a ladle of batter and spread in circles. Drizzle oil, cook until golden. Serve with sambar and coconut chutney.
cooking.omelette: Sir, for a basic Omelette: Beat 2-3 eggs with salt, pepper, and a splash of milk. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat. Pour egg mixture, let it set slightly, add fillings (cheese, veggies). Fold and serve.
cooking.fried rice: Sir, for Fried Rice: Cook and cool rice beforehand. In a wok, heat oil on high flame. Add garlic, then vegetables (carrots, peas, capsicum). Add scrambled eggs. Add rice, soy sauce, salt, pepper. Stir-fry for 3-5 minutes on high heat.
cooking.paneer butter masala: Sir, for Paneer Butter Masala: Make a paste of tomatoes, onions, cashews, and spices. Saute in butter, add cream, garam masala, kasuri methi. Add cubed paneer. Simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with cream and serve with naan or rice.

error_help.indentationerror: IndentationError: Python uses indentation for blocks. Use 4 spaces per level.
error_help.nameerror: NameError: Variable or function not defined. Check spelling.
error_help.typeerror: TypeError: Operation on incompatible types. Check data types.
error_help.syntaxerror: SyntaxError: Invalid syntax. Check for missing colons or brackets.
error_help.filenotfounderror: FileNotFoundError: File doesn't exist. Check the path.
error_help.indexerror: IndexError: List index out of range.
